name: Aphex
description: Korg MS-10/MS-20 hybrid mono synth — faithful panel layout with KORG-35 (REV.1) and OTA (REV.2) filter circuits, source-side patchbay, ESP, and a Modern page for trim/extras.
author: Filliformes

chain_params.name: LPF Cut
chain_params.description: LPF cutoff frequency (50Hz–15kHz per MS-20 spec)

chain_params.name: LPF Peak
chain_params.description: LPF resonance (flat → self-osc)

chain_params.name: HPF Cut
chain_params.description: HPF cutoff frequency

chain_params.name: HPF Peak
chain_params.description: HPF resonance

chain_params.name: MG Freq
chain_params.description: MG (LFO) frequency, 0.05 Hz to 40 Hz (extends past MS-20 spec into audio-rate territory; per-sample mod handles aliasing)

chain_params.name: MG Depth
chain_params.description: Global MG depth

chain_params.name: M.Tune
chain_params.description: Master tune ±100 cents (DSP scales by 100 internally — full encoder sweep = ±100¢)

chain_params.name: Volume
chain_params.description: Output level

chain_params.name: Preset
chain_params.description: 40 character presets across 8 categories (Bass / Lead / Pad / Keys / Sequence / SFX / Drone / ESP) inspired by Korg Collection MS-20 V2 and Arturia MS-20 V

chain_params.name: Portamento
chain_params.description: Glide time in seconds (max ~1s; MS-20 spec is 10s but we cap for usability)

chain_params.name: Trigger
chain_params.description: Manual gate (MS-20 mini TRIG SW button equivalent — momentary)

chain_params.name: Rnd Patch
chain_params.description: One-shot full randomization — fresh patch with musical bounds

chain_params.name: Mutate
chain_params.description: Small ±20% variation of 6 random parameters around the current patch — keeps character, finds variations

chain_params.name: Rnd Mod
chain_params.description: Randomize ONLY the patchbay jack assignments — keeps current sound, scrambles routing

chain_params.name: Reset Patch
chain_params.description: Reset to Init defaults

chain_params.name: Scale 1
chain_params.description: VCO 1 octave (MS-20 SCALE switch) — each step = 1 octave

chain_params.name: Wave
chain_params.description: VCO 1 waveform (MS-20 set)

chain_params.name: PW
chain_params.description: VCO 1 pulse width (1:1 → 1:∞)

chain_params.name: Scale 2
chain_params.description: VCO 2 octave (MS-20 SCALE switch) — each step = 1 octave

chain_params.name: Pitch
chain_params.description: VCO 2 PITCH knob in semitones (±2 octaves per MS-20 Kit spec)

chain_params.name: Wave
chain_params.description: VCO 2 waveform (MS-20 set; Ring is one of 4 wave slots, not a separate mix)

chain_params.name: Sync
chain_params.description: VCO1→VCO2 hard sync (MS-20 mini Kit slide switch)

chain_params.name: FM
chain_params.description: VCO1→VCO2 hard FM (MS-20 mini Kit slide switch — binary)

chain_params.name: Detune
chain_params.description: Fine detune (Modern continuous control)

chain_params.name: MG/T.EXT
chain_params.description: VCO MIXER FREQ MOD attenuator: MG (or T.EXT jack) → both VCOs' pitch

chain_params.name: EG1/EXT
chain_params.description: VCO MIXER FREQ MOD attenuator: EG1 (or EXT jack) → both VCOs' pitch

chain_params.name: Sub
chain_params.description: Sub osc level (Modern extra; not on MS-20)

chain_params.name: ESP Aud
chain_params.description: ESP audio into mixer (matches MS-20 patching workflow)

chain_params.name: FB
chain_params.description: Output→input feedback (Modern extra)

chain_params.name: HPF MG
chain_params.description: HPF cutoff modulation by MG (or T.EXT jack if patched)

chain_params.name: HPF EG
chain_params.description: HPF cutoff modulation by EG2 (or EXT jack if patched)

chain_params.name: LPF MG
chain_params.description: LPF cutoff modulation by MG

chain_params.name: LPF EG
chain_params.description: LPF cutoff modulation by EG2

chain_params.name: Mode
chain_params.description: MS-20 is fixed HP+LP cascade (default); other modes are Modern extras

chain_params.name: E1 Delay
chain_params.description: EG1 Delay (MS-20 trapezoid: D-A-Sustain@max-R, 3 knobs only)

chain_params.name: E2 Hold
chain_params.description: EG2 Hold (MS-20 spec: max 20s)

chain_params.name: MG Shape
chain_params.description: MG slope output: 0=positive saw, 0.5=triangle, 1=negative saw — continuously variable (MS-20 spec)

chain_params.name: MG PW
chain_params.description: MG pulse output duty cycle: 0=wide, 0.5=square, 1=narrow (independent from shape, both outputs always available)

chain_params.name: Sig Lvl
chain_params.description: ESP signal input level (MS-20 spec)

chain_params.name: Lo Cut
chain_params.description: ESP low-cut (50Hz–2.5kHz)

chain_params.name: Hi Cut
chain_params.description: ESP high-cut (100Hz–5kHz)

chain_params.name: CV Adj
chain_params.description: ESP pitch CV V/oct trim

chain_params.name: Threshold
chain_params.description: ESP gate threshold

chain_params.name: KBD CV In
chain_params.description: What feeds VCO1+VCO2 Hz/V CV (defaults to keyboard)

chain_params.name: T.EXT
chain_params.description: Replaces MG in panel MG/T.EXT attenuators (VCO Master, HPF, LPF)

chain_params.name: VCO Freq
chain_params.description: Replaces EG1 in VCO Master EG1/EXT attenuator

chain_params.name: HPF EG/Ext
chain_params.description: HPF cutoff envelope source (default EG1, unipolar — opens only)

chain_params.name: LPF EG/Ext
chain_params.description: LPF cutoff envelope source (default EG1, the filter env; unipolar — opens only)

chain_params.name: Initial Gain
chain_params.description: INITIAL GAIN — adds to EG2's VCA control (MS-20 spec, no attenuator)

chain_params.name: PWM In
chain_params.description: PWM IN — modulates VCO1 PW-Square (MS-20 mini Kit feature, demoted to menu in panel-strict mode)

chain_params.name: Ext Sig
chain_params.description: VCF external signal input (3Vp-p max per MS-20 spec). Track 1-4 read from /move-track-audio SHM — feed any other track through Aphex's K35 filter (Schwung v0.7.8+). Caveat: routing the track Aphex is on creates a feedback loop.

chain_params.name: VCO 2 CV
chain_params.description: VCO 2 CV IN jack — separate Hz/V into VCO 2 only (independent from VCO 1)

chain_params.name: EG1 Trig
chain_params.description: EG 1 TRIG IN — rising edge retriggers EG 1 (in addition to keyboard)

chain_params.name: EG1+2 Trig
chain_params.description: EG 1+2 TRIG IN — rising edge retriggers both envelopes

chain_params.name: Drift
chain_params.description: Global analog drift intensity (drift.h: multi-source per-instance jitter)

chain_params.name: Drive
chain_params.description: Pre-filter saturation (Modern; not on original MS-20). 20ms smoothed for pop-free knob turns.

chain_params.name: KeyTrack
chain_params.description: Filter cutoff follows pitch (Modern)

chain_params.name: Filter Rev
chain_params.description: Early MS-20/MS-10 KORG-35 (creamy fuzz break-up) vs late MS-20 LM13600 OTA (cleaner howl)

chain_params.name: MS-10 Mode
chain_params.description: Collapse to MS-10 layout: VCO1 + LPF + EG2 only

chain_params.name: V1 Drift
chain_params.description: Per-VCO1 drift trim (Diva Trimmers-style)

chain_params.name: V2 Drift
chain_params.description: Per-VCO2 drift trim

chain_params.name: X-Mod Amt
chain_params.description: Continuous X-Mod depth (Modern; original is on/off only)

chain_params.name: MW→MG
chain_params.description: Mod wheel → MG depth (Modern)

chain_params.name: MW→Filt
chain_params.description: Mod wheel → LPF cutoff (Modern)
